prompt: A bright, refreshing commercial photography shot of a {argument name="subject description" default="young handsome East Asian man with dark bangs"} wearing a {argument name="clothing" default="light blue crewneck sweater"}. He is smiling gently at the camera and holding up a clear plastic water bottle with condensation and a blue label that reads "{argument name="product name" default="POCARI SWEAT"}". The background is a soft-focus, airy room with light blue walls, framed pictures, a warm lamp, and a bright blue sky visible through a window on the left. In the bottom left corner, there is white overlay text that reads "{argument name="overlay text line 1" default="포카리 스웨트"}" above a second line reading "{argument name="overlay text line 2" default="이온을 채워, 순간을 살아"}", underlined by a dynamic white swoosh graphic. The lighting is soft, natural, and inviting, emphasizing a clean and hydrating aesthetic.
translatedPrompt: 一张明亮清爽的商业摄影作品，主角为一位 {argument name="subject description" default="留着黑色短发的帅气年轻亚裔男性"}，身穿一件 {argument name="clothing" default="浅蓝色针织毛衣"}。他面带柔和微笑，直视镜头，手中拿着一瓶挂着水珠的透明塑料水瓶。瓶身贴有亮蓝色标签，上面印有白色文字“{argument name="product label" default="POCARI SWEAT"}”。背景分为两部分：左侧窗外可见清澈的浅蓝色天空，右侧为柔焦处理的温馨室内，配有相框和暖色调台灯。左下角有清晰的白色叠加文字，显示为“{argument name="overlay text line 1" default="포카리 스웨트"}”，下方是一行更大的文字“{argument name="overlay text line 2" default="이온을 채워, 순간을 살아"}”，并配有底部的白色弧形动感图形。整体光线柔和、自然且通透，营造出一种纯净、补水的氛围。

breakdown.creativeCore: 清爽饮料商业人像：生成一张明亮、商业风格的人像，展示人物手持品牌饮料并带有促销文字叠加。
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.bestUse: 产品首图、广告图、电商详情页首屏

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 产品/电商 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[媒介/渲染方式/审美方向/色彩系统]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: camera]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
